hero.subtitle: LifeKit helps you settle in, earn, and meet the right people wherever you land.
hero.note: No credit card needed · Available globally
hero.mockupMessage: You just moved to Lisbon. Here's your first week plan.
hero.mockupNearby: 2 people near you · tap to view

process.label: The Process
process.title: From landed to settled in three moves.
process.step1Desc: Tell Kit where you are, what you need, and what you can offer. It listens like a person, not a search engine.
process.step2Desc: Kit shows services, opportunities, and communities that fit your situation, instead of another generic feed.
process.step3Desc: Book services, swap skills, join your people. Start building a life that works.

features.label: What's Inside
features.title: Everything you need. Nothing you don't.
features.f1Desc: A practical assistant for finding services, answering questions, and planning your next move wherever you land.
features.f2Desc: Book trusted local services in seconds, or list your own and get discovered by people who need you.
features.f3Desc: Trade your skills with others without spending money. A haircut for a lesson, design for cooking. Always free.
features.f4Desc: Find your people. Join local hubs, share tips, get referrals, and build connections that actually help.

scenarios.label: Who It's For
scenarios.title: Wherever you're starting from.
scenarios.s1Title: Just landed in a new city?
scenarios.s1Desc: Kit helps with your first week, from SIM cards and coworking spaces to people worth meeting.
scenarios.s2Title: Want to earn while you settle?
scenarios.s2Desc: The Opportunity Engine matches your skills with demand nearby. No job board scrolling.
scenarios.s3Desc: Communities built for where you are and what you care about. Not another Discord to get lost in.

bookings.subtitle: Customers build a cart of services, pay through our secure escrow system, and you get notified immediately. Pricing, scheduling, and payouts are handled for you.
bookings.feature1Desc: Customers can book multiple services from multiple providers in a single checkout.
bookings.feature2Desc: Funds are held securely until the service is delivered. You get paid, guaranteed.
bookings.feature3Desc: Set a flat rate or charge per hour, and the app handles the maths for you.

aiTools.title: Five tools that save time and keep work moving.
aiTools.subtitle: LifeKit handles the busywork so you can focus on clients, bookings, and steady income.
aiTools.tool1Desc: Scans local demand daily and surfaces the exact services you should be offering this week to maximise revenue.
aiTools.tool2Title: List a service in under 10 seconds
aiTools.tool2Desc: Describe your skill in plain language. LifeKit drafts the title, description, and price in seconds.
aiTools.tool3Desc: Kit helps customers find services, get quick answers, and book at any time of day.
aiTools.tool4Title: A 7-day plan built just for you
aiTools.tool4Desc: A personalised onboarding roadmap guides new providers through their first bookings step by step.
aiTools.tool5Desc: LifeKit suggests compatible swap partners based on skill value, location, and availability.

social.label: Real Providers. Real Earnings.
social.title: Providers already earning on LifeKit.
social.t1Text: LifeKit helped me put my service listing together in under a minute. Bookings came in the same day. I've never had this kind of visibility before.
social.t2Text: Opportunity Radar suggested I add nail extensions. That one service doubled my revenue within a month.
social.t3Text: I used Skill Swap to trade my photography sessions for accounting help. Real value without spending a penny. Complete game changer.

finalCta.subtitle: Join thousands of people using LifeKit to settle in, earn, and connect wherever they land next.
finalCta.note: Free to join · No card required · Ships globally

footer.tagline: A service ecosystem where skilled providers can earn, swap, and grow together.
footer.builtWith: Built with care for every skilled professional.

login.sideSubtitle: Your customers are waiting. Sign in to manage bookings, track earnings, and grow your business.
login.testimonial1: LifeKit helped me create my service listing quickly. Bookings came in the same day.
login.testimonial2: Opportunity Radar suggested nail extensions, and that one service doubled my revenue.

register.termsText: By registering you agree to our
register.sideBenefit: Get 1 Year of Pro for Free when you register today. No credit card, no catch.
register.trust1: 0% commission forever as a founding member
register.trust2: 1 full year of Pro tier, completely free
register.trust4: Autofill helps create your listings in seconds

register.errorResend: Could not resend the code. Please try again.
register.errorPasswordShort: Password must be at least 6 characters.
register.errorGeneric: Something went wrong. Please try again.
